name: topvee-mvp
description: Topvee Media - Dual Project Repository (HTML + Next.js)

scripts.start: echo '❌ This is not a Node.js project. Use: npm run start:html or npm run start:next'
scripts.start:html: echo '✅ Opening standalone HTML website...' && start index.html
scripts.start:next: echo '✅ Starting Next.js development server...' && cd topvee-empire && npm run dev
scripts.install:next: echo '✅ Installing Next.js dependencies...' && cd topvee-empire && npm install
scripts.build:next: echo '✅ Building Next.js application...' && cd topvee-empire && npm run build
scripts.help: echo 'Available commands:' && echo '  npm run start:html  - Open standalone HTML website' && echo '  npm run start:next  - Start Next.js development server' && echo '  npm run install:next - Install Next.js dependencies' && echo '  npm run build:next   - Build Next.js for production'

author: Valentine Okeke
